query:
ALTER TABLE boardLayoutSettings 
ADD COLUMN postWidth VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'auto',
ADD COLUMN postHeight VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'auto',
ADD COLUMN postMarginTop VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '0',
ADD COLUMN postTitleSize VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'base';
